patResult:
The Assertion (System() |= []<> beat) is NOT valid.
A counterexample is presented as follows.
<init -> tock -> [Wait[0]] -> tock -> tock -> tock -> tock -> [Wait[0]] -> (tick_event -> [if!((timeSinceLastBeat >= PACEMAKER_DELAY))] -> tock -> [Wait[0]] -> tick_event -> [if((timeSinceLastBeat >= PACEMAKER_DELAY))] -> deliver_pace -> tock -> [Wait[0]])*>
